result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mont...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_4mo AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_4mo c ON c.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.case_id,
         c.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_4mo c
  LEFT JOIN owner_changes oc ON oc.case_id = c.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oc.owner_change_cnt,0) = 0
    AND c.closeddate > c.createddate
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS managed_cases
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS managed_cases
  FROM "Case"
  GROUP BY 1
), agent_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         SUM(managed_cases) AS managed_cases
  FROM agent_case_counts
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_handle AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ec.ownerid) AS agent_id,
         AVG(ec.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agent_managed am ON am.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE am.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_4mo AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_4mo c ON c.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.case_id,
         c.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_4mo c
  LEFT JOIN owner_changes oc ON oc.case_id = c.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oc.owner_change_cnt,0) = 0
    AND c.closeddate > c.createddate
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS managed_cases
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS managed_cases
  FROM "Case"
  GROUP BY 1
), agent_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         SUM(managed_cases) AS managed_cases
  FROM agent_case_counts
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_handle AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ec.ownerid) AS agent_id,
         AVG(ec.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agent_managed am ON am.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE am.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_4mo AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_4mo c ON c.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.case_id,
         c.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_4mo c
  LEFT JOIN owner_changes oc ON oc.case_id = c.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oc.owner_change_cnt,0) = 0
    AND c.closeddate > c.createddate
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS managed_cases
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS managed_cases
  FROM "Case"
  GROUP BY 1
), agent_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         SUM(managed_cases) AS managed_cases
  FROM agent_case_counts
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_handle AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ec.ownerid) AS agent_id,
         AVG(ec.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agent_managed am ON am.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE am.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_4mo AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_4mo c ON c.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.case_id,
         c.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closed_ts - c.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM case_4mo c
  LEFT JOIN owner_changes oc ON oc.case_id = c.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oc.owner_change_cnt,0) = 0
    AND c.closed_ts > c.created_ts
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS managed_cases
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS managed_cases
  FROM "Case"
  GROUP BY 1
), agent_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         SUM(managed_cases) AS managed_cases
  FROM agent_case_counts
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_handle AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ec.ownerid) AS agent_id,
         AVG(ec.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agent_managed am ON am.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE am.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
